nodes.label: AI for engaging creative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for boring or routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: The more interested I am in a task, the more I want to take charge of it and do the majority myself

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for unclear tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as delegator for clear tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it's something I haven't fully grasped yet, I collaborate and brainstorm with AI

nodes.label: AI as necessity and support under pressure
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of suspicion and concern
nodes.grounding_span: AI is seen widely in the company as both a necessity and a helpful support

nodes.label: AI reliability for long-form content
nodes.grounding_span: I found the output quite frustrating, because it is a longer format than ChatGPT would usually support

nodes.label: AI as threat to job role
nodes.label_negative: AI as opportunity for role evolution
nodes.grounding_span: I believe the majority of my job will probably be overtaken by AI one day

nodes.label: AI usage regulation and compliance
nodes.grounding_span: our use of AI becomes more internally regulated due to the potential compliance risks

nodes.label: Personal engagement and creative satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: The more interested I am in a task, the more I want to take charge of it

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: AI is seen widely in the company as both a necessity and a helpful support to help us increase what we can achieve

nodes.label: Quality and control over output
nodes.grounding_span: I had to give a lot more oversight, guidance and suggestion than I expected

nodes.label: Career adaptability and future-proofing
nodes.grounding_span: I am actively trying to learn more about these areas and improve my skills in prompting so I can keep ahead of the curve

nodes.label: Preference for human control over creative tasks

nodes.label: Proactive learning to adapt to AI-driven changes

nodes.label: Task-based delegation vs collaboration based on clarity
nodes.grounding_span: It really varies depending on the complexity of what I need and how 'fleshed out' the task is in my mind

nodes.label: Forward-looking and proactive skill development
